items.prompt: In Example 8.38, what primarily enables external reuse of the climate agriculture dataset?
choices: Shared metadata, dictionary, and provenance templates with versioned releases
Keeping all transforms only in private chat
Training without documenting units or sources
items.explain: Templates plus version tags make multi-source research auditable and reusable.

items.prompt: Example 8.39 pairs dataset tags with model tags so a deployed failure can recover the matching sensor snapshot and artifacts.
items.explain: DVC pinning links training results back to exact data and pipeline outputs.

choices: Open anonymous write access for all packages
Governed catalogs, release notes, role-based access, and auditability
items.explain: Sensitive multi-role work needs controlled access plus auditable versioned packages.

items.prompt: Name one failure mode that version pins prevent in the predictive-maintenance case.
items.rubric: Two training runs using different data under the same code checkout / inability to recover the sensor snapshot behind a bad model.
items.sample_answer: They prevent retraining on mismatched sensor batches when the same code checkout would otherwise look identical.
